quotes.text: Death is no man's friend
And I can't tell daylight from streetlights any-fucking-more
I'll stay out until my lungs bleed
Forever would just be so easy to fall into

Memento Mori.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: Death is an open door
Death is an open door
Let me live and die in peace
The sea will part, where oceans meet. Finally complete
Was your life worth dying for?
Dismantled piece by piece, what's left will not decease
I swear I will not look back...
It'll wear you down through skin and bone, through skin and bone
Death is an open door
Death is an open door
What will be will be
Death is not defeat
Death is not defeat
Now you're finally complete, I will see you where oceans meet
Now you're finally complete, I will see you where oceans meet
I'll dismantle piece by piece and I will know that death is not defeat
When I leave this skin and bone

Dying Is Absolutely Safe.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Death is not my enemy
May all the beggars be blessed
Beloved distant blue, one day I'll die for you
I've got a lot to lose, but I won't lie to you
Im praying for a remedy
With the ravens here to stay and the doves all flying away
Dying is absolutely safe

Impermanence.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: We're all players in a symphony
'Cause nobody wants to meet their maker
Do you really wanna live forever?

be very afraid.album: The Classic Symptoms of a Broken Spirit

quotes.text: We're all players and the world's a stage
Living but we never learn

Dead Butterflies.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: I just want to live and die in piece
Goodbye, all the doves have flown away

Libertine.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Parting the seas isn't free

Nihilist.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: We are beggars, we are so fucking weak
Well, we're all dying to meet our maker
They'd trade their hearts if they were made of gold, but they're as worthless as the souls they sold
We're nothing more than royal beggars
We're nothing more than royal beggars
'Cause we're asleep in a hurricane
Do you wanna live forever alone?
Can you live a life worth dying for?
God, what a sorry state
I'll always carry the cross, but all is not lost
Now it's time to sink or swim
Hope's a dangerous thing

Gone With The Wind.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: ... «my friend, hope is a prison»
... «my friend, hope is a prison»
A sickness with no remedy except the ones inside of me
If hope is a prison, then maybe faith will set me free
If hope is a prison, then maybe faith will set me free

Blackhole.album: The Sky, The Earth & All Between

quotes.text: Bombs drop on the prison hope built instead.
I close my eyes and I die a thousand times

Gravity.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: So twist the knife 'cause I'm finally awake
It's just a matter of time before the wave breaks
Don't forget to breathe when the knife begins to twist
Don't forget to breathe when the knife begins to twist
Holy hell, I've got nothing left to lose
Remember we were born to burn
Light one match and burn down the empire
These wounds will set me free
Maybe we'll never learn?
Maybe we'll never learn?

Flight Without Feathers.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Don't forget to breathe
That distant blue, that's me and you
So repeat this line, «everything, everything is fine»
These colours don't run
Don't believe everything that you're told

Little Wonder.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Everything is fucking fine
Everything is fucking fine

Whiplash.album: The Sky, The Earth & All Between

quotes.text: Everything is going to be fine

Black Lungs.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Are you sleeping deep in the hurricane?
Justice lays bound and black bagged
Will enough be enough when we're holding on for dear life?
'Cause every wave has got to break
Too lost in the light to see what matters most
All I want is a moment or something I can hold close for eternity
Find a little light and hold it close, don't lose sight of what matters most
Find a little light and hold it close, don't lose sight of what matters most
Dear, oh dear, what a sorry state we're in

Meteor.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Is there no remedy, remedy?
Is there no remedy, remedy?
God only knows why we were born to burn
A fucking tyrant in a Hollow Crown
They hung the heroes
Tell the rats to get back in the gutter

Goliath.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: We'll all be hanging a hero
No time for rats in the gutter

All Love Is Lost.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: All love is lost, so carry the cross
We will arm them to the teeth
And still today I cannot tell dreams from nightmares anymore
Our lungs will not collapse
I close my eyes
I close my eyes and I still fucking see you
I close my eyes and I still fucking see you
I close my eyes and take a deep breath
I close my eyes and take a deep breath
We'll fight them to the death
Burn down the houses
Pray that our justice be done
Light me up its all too much for me
Burn everything you have and leave it all behind
Burn everything you have and leave it all behind
If time only stood still for ever
Remove your Hollow Crown

burn down my house.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: Burn down my house
Tell them it was all worth it
Been searching all day for the answers

A Match Made In Heaven.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: Tell me was it all worth it
The colours are fading
I've been searching through the wreckage
How can you smile when you see me crumbling?
How can you stand there and look me in the eye?
Find safety in yourself

Do You Dream Of Armageddon?.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: We all fall in parallel
A guilty conscience hangs over your head
I'm not looking back

Elegy.album: The Sky, The Earth & All Between

quotes.text: A guilty conscience? I doubt that you'd ever had one
Will this ever end or will time stand still forever?
These wounds have bled
I used to sink and now I swim
... That's what we're told
Shed this skin

Downfall.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: Watch them shed their skin
Seven billion, one of a kind/Collide together, intertwined
Seven billion hungry ghosts
But we're still holding on for dear life
I just can't accept what will be will be

deep fake.album: The Classic Symptoms of a Broken Spirit

quotes.text: They've got a fist full of fucking gold, a return for the souls they sold
Tear down the walls, built to divide/Can you feel that fire growing?
Now tear down the walls that were built to divide/It's time to extinguish that fire, that fire inside
Believe that we're nothing more than sisters and brothers

Discourse Is Dead.album: For Those That Wish to Exist

quotes.text: We're all sisters and brothers

The Empty Hourglass.album: All Our Gods Have Abandoned Us

quotes.text: The empty hourglass, we're going nowhere fast

tear gas.album: The Classic Symptoms of a Broken Spirit

quotes.text: Are you looking at the hourglass?
And learn to live
